title: sprint.schema.json does not define step_log; gate practice violates strict schema
description: Adherence Agents append gate verdicts to a step_log array in the active sprint JSON (established practice since sprint 4 planning), but sprint.schema.json sets additionalProperties:false and defines no step_log — every gated sprint file fails strict validation. Resolve by adding an optional step_log definition to the schema (Src-First: src/template/.excn/schemas first, root mirrors) or by relocating verdict logging; the gate-watch verdict-sensing retro note (sprint 4) bears on the same choice.
acceptance_criteria: A gated sprint JSON validates strictly against sprint.schema.json
Adherence Agent verdict logging conforms to wherever the decision lands
fix: Optional step_log added to sprint.schema.json (template + root); sprint_4/5 validate strictly; gate-watch verdict sensing extended (sprint-JSON writes + Stop-time evidence scan). Gates PASS (one revise cycle: named patterns).
notes: Filed 2026-06-10 from scribe validation flag at sprint-4 record close.
